hook.name: ClankerHookStaticFeeV2
hook.description: Clanker token pool hook that applies separate static LP fees per swap direction (buying vs. selling the Clanker token), collects a 20% protocol fee on each swap via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta, and supports an optional MEV protection module that can temporarily raise fees during the first 2 minutes after pool deployment.
